name: Filesystem / disk I/O errors
description: Kernel-level filesystem or block-device errors: EXT4-fs/XFS errors, Buffer I/O error, medium/ATA errors. Indicates a failing disk or corruption.
query: _msg:~"(EXT4-fs error|XFS \\(|Buffer I/O error|blk_update_request: I/O error|critical medium error|critical target error|exception Emask)"
